title: abies nordmanniana subsp. bornmuelleriana
intro: Abies nordmanniana subsp. bornmuelleriana, also known as Bornmueller's fir, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to the Caucasus region. The resin of this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with studies suggesting that it may exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bornmueller's fir are still being researched, but it is believed to have potential in treating various conditions, including respiratory issues and skin disorders. In traditional herbal medicine, the resin is often prepared by distillation or maceration in water or oil to create a tincture or essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically for its potential therapeutic effects.
